Activity P (Flooring) is scheduled for 1 day (day 43 to 44) and has 2 days of float before Q starts on day 46. A 1-day delay to Activity P increases its duration to 2 days (finishing on day 45), which is fully absorbed by the float and does not delay the project finish date.",
